labor_share.method: QCEW 2024 private total annual wages at 314994 ($319,286,186) x benefits multiplier 1.4294 [ECEC private-industry total comp $46.60/hr / wages $32.60/hr = 1.4294 (March 2026 reference period)] / SUSB 2022 receipts at 314994 ($1,992,504,000).
